hints: Start by defining houseLeft and houseTop, then derive other positions from those
The roof overhangs the house by 4 on each side: roofLeft = houseLeft - 4
Window positions can be calculated from houseLeft: window1Left = houseLeft + 10
The door is centered: doorLeft = houseLeft + (houseWidth - doorWidth) / 2
The door knob x = doorLeft + doorWidth - knobRadius - 1
